title: Seclusion Braids
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:WeequaySeclusionBraid.jpg|thumb|right|Seclusion Braids]]

'''Seclusion Braids''' was the phrase used to describe the braids that a male [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] wove into their topnots while they were away from their homeworld. Typically a Weequay male twisted one seclusion braid for every year he was away from [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tatooine Ghost]]''

*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
